untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern detection and the horizontal distance ratio calculation (distance from head C to shoulder A divided by distance from head C to shoulder E between 0.8 and 1.25) require multi-bar pattern recognition and geometric analysis not available in the provided indicator set. Pattern identification, peak/trough detection at specific labeled points (A, C, E), and symmetry ratio calculations cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicators.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires pattern recognition logic that cannot be encoded with standard technical indicators. The allowed indicator set lacks: (1) pattern detection capability, (2) multi-bar peak/trough identification with labeling, (3) geometric distance calculations between identified swing points. A functional implementation would require custom pattern detection logic external to this rules engine. The entry/exit structure provided is a placeholder using pivot-based neckline approximation and volume confirmation, but does not capture the true head-and-shoulders symmetry filtering requirement.
